prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.1 kg; Height 151.9 cm; BMI 33.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.3%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 178mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 77.9kg; 9 months ago 75.2kg; 6 months ago 77.9kg; 3 months ago 78.1kg; current 77.1kg), Height (12 months ago 151.9cm; 9 months ago 151.9cm; 6 months ago 151.9cm; 3 months ago 151.9cm; current 151.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 33.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 101U/L; 9 months ago 102U/L; 6 months ago 106U/L; 3 months ago 107U/L; current 102U/L), AST (12 months ago 100U/L; 9 months ago 106U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 105U/L; current 100U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 4.1mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 3.4mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 3.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 1.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 2mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 668mg/g; 9 months ago 713mg/g; 6 months ago 962mg/g; 3 months ago 734mg/g; current 820mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 104mg/dL; 9 months ago 115mg/dL; 6 months ago 116mg/dL; 3 months ago 102mg/dL; current 109mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.71 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
